title: Fault Event
description: A sensor, actuator, or subsystem fault detected by the controller, published on gh/{greenhouse_id}/fault (controller spec §7 safety interlocks, §8 sensor fault detection). The envelope zone_id scopes zone-local faults (e.g. a zone's soil-moisture sensor or irrigation valve).

fault_type.description: Closed set of fault conditions. stuck/out_of_range are generic sensor faults; sensor_disagreement/redundancy_degraded/temperature_unavailable are temperature-fusion faults; critical_temperature/co2_ceiling/irrigation_no_response are safety-interlock triggers. actuator_stuck (observed diverges from commanded), actuator_no_response (commanded change with no climate effect), and setpoint_unreachable (sustained actuator saturation) are actuator-health faults (controller safety spec §5 actuator health monitoring); irrigation_no_response is the pre-existing zone-scoped instance of actuator_no_response.

severity.description: warning = degraded but operating; alarm = safety-interlock or loss-of-trust condition.

component.description: Identifier of the faulted sensor, actuator, or subsystem (e.g. temperature, humidity, co2, par, soil_moisture, irrigation_valve).

response.description: Fail-safe action the controller took (e.g. 'disabled injector', 'opened vents, disabled injector', 'disabled zone irrigation').
